title: Section 33EEB
content: 1[33EEB. Regulation of manufacture for sale of Ayurvedic, Siddha and Unani drugs.--No person shall manufacture for sale or for distribution any Ayurvedic, Siddha and Unani drug except in accordance with such standards, if any, as may be prescribed in relation to that drug.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 31, ibid., for sections.33D and 33E (w.e.f. 1-2-1983).
